summary: Top‑tour performance captured on an outstanding audience source
review: The reviewer hails this concert as the best show of the tour and praises the audio as the best audience recording available, suggesting a clear and engaging listening experience. While no specific songs or player highlights are mentioned, the overall tone is highly enthusiastic.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review calls it the best show of the tour with the best audio source, indicating both strong musical and recording quality, but confidence is low due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes it as the best audience source on this release, implying clear, well‑balanced sound despite being an audience recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
